Name: Aunaratha
Effect: Equipped creature gets +1/+1; Whenever a creature is destroyed by Aunaratha, you gain 1 life; Equip 2

Name: Simulacrum
Effect: As an additional cost to cast Simulacrum, pay X life. Simulacrum enters the battlefield with X +1/+0 counters.If X is 5 or more, Simulacrum also gains Flying.

Name: Giant Vampire Bat
Effect: Flying; Whenever you attack, you may tap this creature to give target creature you control Flying until end of turn.

Name: Dishonored Ghoul
Effect: When Dishonored Ghoul dies, you may pay 1 life to return it to your hand.

Name: Mighty Serpent of the Vale
Effect: Deathtouch; When this creature dies, you lose four life.

Name: Grandmother Isa
Effect: As long as Grandmother Isa is in your graveyard, you may cast one creature spell from your graveyard on each of your turns. Pay 1 life in addition to their normal mana cost.

Name: Pox
Effect: Lifelink; At the beginning of your end step, Pox deals 1 damage to target non-black creature.

Name: Touch of Zot
Effect: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn.

Name: Share Blood
Effect: As an additional cost to cast Share Blood, pay X life. Target creature heals 1/2 X life.

Name: Choking Fume
Effect: Lifelink; Choking Fume deals 1 damage to all non-black creatures.

Name: Immortality
Effect: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a -1/+1 counter on it.

Name: Beseech the Shadows
Effect: You draw two cards and lose two life.

Name: Come Home
Effect: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Return X target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

Name: Press Into Service
Effect: Exile X target creature cards from graveyards. Create X 2/1 ghoul creature golems.

Name: Honor with Immortality
Effect: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Create a golem of that card. (A golem is a copy of a card with the same power and toughness but no abilities).

Name: Drain Life
Effect: Drain Life deals X damage to target creature or player. You gain life equal to the amount of life lost.

Name: Terror
Effect: Creatures you control gain Fear until end of turn. (they can only be blocked by black creatures and golems).
